subtasks.description: Evaluate emergency access request from u_9981 (senior-engineer) to db-payments-primary against access control and incident response policies. Verify role-based entitlements, incident severity thresholds, audit trail requirements, and approval authority.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask assigned to mid tier because this is a multi-policy evaluation: (1) role-based access control (RBAC) verification for senior-engineer role against production database, (2) P1 incident severity exception criteria, (3) on-call authority and delegation rules, and (4) audit/logging requirements for emergency access. This requires reasoning across multiple applicable policies and potential exceptions, beyond a single straightforward rule check. No additional subtasks needed — the policy engine will return approval status, required conditions, and audit directives as part of the policy evaluation response."

output.reason: User u_9981 (senior-engineer) has an active P1 incident ticket INC-20241215-0042, satisfying POL-501's incident ticket requirement. POL-502 dual-approval requirement is waived under the declared P1 incident exemption for mission-critical resource db-payments-primary. Access is permitted with mandatory audit logging and 24-hour post-incident review per POL-503. Read-write access scope is justified by active P1 investigation needs.
applied_constraints: Access session must be fully logged with all queries and mutations captured in audit trail, referencing INC-20241215-0042
Access grant is time-limited to duration of P1 incident INC-20241215-0042; must be revoked upon incident closure
Post-incident access review required within 24 hours of incident resolution per POL-503
Senior engineer must document all actions taken on db-payments-primary within the incident ticket
Access scope limited to investigation and remediation activities directly related to INC-20241215-0042
Security/DBA team must be notified of emergency access grant within 15 minutes of activation
Read-write access elevated from standard read-only; write operations require justification entry in audit log per action
